results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Core protects your back' is true but not surprising — it needs a sharper contrarian angle or a specific stat to earn the stop.
rationales.clarity: Each slide lands one idea cleanly, though slides 2 and 6 retread the same brace metaphor without adding new information.
rationales.audience_fit: Skews toward 35–50 'back pain veteran' rather than the tired 25-year-old desk worker who hasn't felt the damage yet.
rationales.novelty: Core-protects-back is among the most recycled pieces of fitness advice on the internet; dead bugs and planks add nothing unexpected.
rationales.brand_fit: Health claims are properly hedged, voice stays plain and direct, and the CTA ties naturally to the daily score concept.
rationales.predicted_performance: Low save-share ceiling — the audience has seen this deck a hundred times under different thumbnails, so there's little reason to bookmark it over an existing save.
